Home / Services / Email Marketing / Email Automation

📧 Email Automation

Set up email sequences that work for you around the clock — welcoming new subscribers, nurturing leads, closing sales, and winning back lapsed customers, all on autopilot. We design and build your complete automation flows in your email platform (Mailchimp, ConvertKit, ActiveCampaign, Klaviyo, etc.), including welcome sequences, post-purchase follow-ups, abandoned cart recovery, re-engagement campaigns, and sales sequences with A/B tested subject lines. Every email is written, designed, and configured — ready to send and generate revenue while you sleep.

Service Details

Category: Email Marketing

Credits Price: 240 credits (approx. £300)

Turnaround: 5–8 days

How to Book

  1. Create a free account
  2. Purchase credits or subscribe to a plan
  3. Select this service and submit your brief
  4. Receive your completed project within 5–8 days
Book Email Automation Now

Related Email Marketing Services

  • Lead Nurturing — Strategic email nurturing campaigns that build trust and move leads toward purchase. (200 credits)
  • Campaign Setup — Complete email marketing campaign setup with templates, lists, automation, and tracking. (160 credits)

Why Choose Creative Kaygency for Email Automation?

  • Professional quality at credit-friendly prices
  • Fast turnaround: 5–8 days
  • Satisfaction guarantee with included revisions
  • Track progress from your personal dashboard
  • Save up to 20% by paying with credits
